T0030.title: High-Value Promo Exploit
T0030.definition: Underground slang for an exceptionally profitable marketing loophole or coupon-harvesting opportunity.
T0030.description: Within coupon-harvesting communities, a "lamb shank" refers to a single high-yield marketing campaign or platform vulnerability, distinct from the smaller, repeated gains known as "wool." Discovering a "lamb shank" signifies a major profit opportunity, causing information to spread rapidly through fraud networks and triggering massive, concentrated attacks that can inflict substantial financial losses on a platform within a short period.
T0030.usageExample: Scored a massive lamb shank today. Using cards starting with 37 for purchases over 2500 gave a 137 discount. Found a ride organizer, all three accounts cashed out smoothly—the profit is insane. Spots are still open, brothers, get in fast!
